\tzpentry{ID4422}{Angular Velocity Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4422 introduces Angular Velocity Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \Omega_{\mathrm{top}} = C_1(T^2) + \pi\,w(T^2) + \log \Pi_{\pi}, \end{equation}
